prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2021–2023 年第 20 名，2024 年第 21 名，2025 年第 23 名，2026 年回升至第 21 名，稳居全国顶尖综合大学行列；2026 年声誉评价为明显负面，涉及生命科学学院院长论文造假等学术不端事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第 36（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；化学、工商管理、应用经济学、数学 4 个 A+ 学科，世界史、中国史、中国语言文学、政治学、物理学、理论经济学、生物学、统计学、马克思主义理论 9 个 A 学科，环境科学与工程 A-；物理类招生专业（工科试验班、理科试验班等）与数学、化学、物理学、统计学等优势学科高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科 专业持续高热推荐，与南开大学物理类工科试验班（信息科学与技术、数学与大数据等）方向匹配，支撑报考热度；湖北省 2026 年物理类考生估算约 23.86 万人，较 2025 年 24.98 万人减少约 4.5%，竞争略有缓和；南开大学位于天津，非本省高校，在湖北省无显著地域偏好；该校在湖北招生人数占全国总招生比例较低（2024 年约 2.5%），属常规外省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次后移趋势、2026 年物理类扩招约 14.5%（竞争加剧）、考生总数略降（竞争缓和）、声誉负面（报考热度略降）以及工科专业热度支撑等多重因素；预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 5424 名，区间 4924–5924 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the Physics Category was approximately 4524→4670→4682→4495→4962, with a fluctuation range of 4495–4962 in the past 3 years. The 2025 baseline is about 4962, a significant backward shift of about 467 places compared to 2024. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 63, 63, 64, 64, and 62 students respectively. The 2026 plan is 71 students, an increase of about 14.5% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking: 20th in 2021–2023, 21st in 2024, 23rd in 2025, and rising to 21st in 2026, firmly among the top comprehensive universities nationwide. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving academic misconduct such as paper fraud by the dean of the School of Life Sciences, which may somewhat suppress some candidates' application intentions. Douyin popularity ranking is 36th (relatively popular), with medium-to-high short video exposure. It has 4 A+ disciplines: Chemistry, Business Administration, Applied Economics, and Mathematics; 9 A disciplines: World History, Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Political Science, Physics, Theoretical Economics, Biology, Statistics, and Marxist Theory; and Environmental Science and Engineering rated A-. The Physics Category enrollment majors (Engineering Experimental Class, Science Experimental Class, etc.) are highly correlated with advantageous disciplines such as Mathematics, Chemistry, Physics, and Statistics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, matching the direction of Nankai University's Physics Category Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology, Mathematics and Big Data, etc.), supporting application enthusiasm. In 2026, the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Hubei Province is about 238,600, a decrease of about 4.5% from 249,800 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, not a provincial university, and has no significant regional preference in Hubei Province. The proportion of its enrollment in Hubei to the total national enrollment is relatively low (about 2.5% in 2024), which is a typical out-of-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the backward trend of rankings in 2025, the approximately 14.5% expansion of the Physics Category in 2026 (intensified competition), a slight decrease in the total number of examinees (eased competition), negative reputation (slightly reduced application enthusiasm), and the support of engineering major popularity; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 5424, with a range of 4924–5924.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4924), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
